---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

### Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

### Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Screenshots or Build Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant build log outputs to help explain your problem.

### Environment Details
- OS / Platform: [e.g., Windows 11, Linux, macOS, OpenWRT]
- Target Architecture: [e.g., amd64, arm64, armhf]
- Toolchain / SDK version: [e.g., MSVC 2022, GCC 12, OpenWRT SDK 23.05]
- Relevant Repository/Workflow: [e.g., kodi-build, openwrt-blackhole-feed]

### Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
